nasb.text: So Israel dwells in security, The fountain of Jacob secluded, In a land of grain and new wine; His heavens also drop down dew.

esv.text: So Israel lived in safety, Jacob lived alone, in a land of grain and wine, whose heavens drop down dew.

cnv.text: 所以以色列可以安然居住， 雅各的本源， 獨處在產五穀新酒之地； 他的天也滴下甘露。

ccb.text: 以色列安然居住， 雅各独居一处， 那里盛产五谷新酒， 有天上的雨露滋润。
